title: Senior Financial Analyst - Haribhakti & Co - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Haribhakti & Co - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
